name: adaptive-coach-app
description: Adaptive physiotherapy and training coach app scaffold

scripts.ios:test:ui: cd mobile/ios && xcodebuild test -workspace SuperstarPT.xcworkspace -scheme SuperstarPT -configuration Release -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 17' -derivedDataPath ../.derived-data -resultBundlePath ../.derived-data/UIFeedback-release-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S).xcresult -only-testing:SuperstarPTUITests
